```python
def main():
    import sys
    S = sys.stdin.readline().strip()
    rev_S = S[::-1]
    combined = S + '#' + rev_S
    lps = [0] * len(combined)
    
    for i in range(1, len(combined)):
        j = lps[i - 1]
        while j > 0 and combined[i] != combined[j]:
            j = lps[j - 1]
        if combined[i] == combined[j]:
            j += 1
        lps[i] = j
    
    longest_prefix = lps[-1]
    shortest_palindrome = S + rev_S[:len(S) - longest_prefix]
    print(shortest_palindrome)

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
```
